title: Peek-a-Boo with Thandi
synopsis: Little Thandi plays peek-a-boo with her loving family members throughout the day, discovering each one hiding behind colorful blankets with joyful surprise sounds and gentle interactions.

illustration.description: Toddler Thandi with dark curly hair and bright brown eyes reaches toward a colorful orange and yellow blanket. Her chubby hands are stretched forward with excitement. The background shows a cozy living room with soft pink and cream tones, featuring rounded furniture shapes.
illustration.alt: Little Thandi reaching for a colorful blanket to play peek-a-boo

illustration.description: A smiling Black woman with natural hair emerges from behind the blanket, her arms outstretched toward Thandi. Her face shows pure joy with crinkled eyes and a wide smile. Warm golden light bathes the scene, creating a loving, secure atmosphere with soft watercolor edges.
illustration.alt: Mama appearing from behind the blanket with a joyful expression

illustration.description: Thandi giggles while looking at a blue and green striped blanket that's moving slightly. Her expression shows anticipation and delight. The room has gentle lavender walls with simple, rounded toy blocks scattered nearby in pastel colors.
illustration.alt: Thandi looking excitedly at a moving striped blanket

illustration.description: A tall Black man with a beard and warm smile pops out from the blanket, making silly faces at Thandi. His eyes sparkle with playfulness and his hands are positioned like jazz hands. The illustration uses warm browns and golds with high contrast for visual appeal.
illustration.alt: Papa making funny faces while emerging from the blanket

illustration.description: Thandi crawls toward a small purple blanket that's clearly hiding someone small. Her expression shows curiosity and joy. The setting shows a soft carpet with gentle geometric patterns in muted pastels, creating a safe play environment.
illustration.alt: Thandi crawling toward a small purple blanket

illustration.description: A toddler boy with mixed-race features and curly hair emerges giggling from the purple blanket. Both children have their hands up in surprise, their faces showing pure delight. The illustration emphasizes their similar heights and the joy of sibling play with bright, cheerful colors.
illustration.alt: Big brother Dada surprising Thandi from under the blanket

illustration.description: Thandi stands holding onto a chair, looking up at a floral pink and white blanket. Her stance shows growing confidence and excitement. The room includes a rocking chair and soft lighting that creates a cozy, multigenerational home feeling with warm earth tones.
illustration.alt: Thandi standing and looking up at Granny's floral blanket

illustration.description: An elderly Black woman with silver hair and gentle wrinkles appears with arms wide open, her face radiating love and warmth. She wears a soft cardigan in muted rose color. The illustration captures the special bond between grandmother and granddaughter with golden, glowing light.
illustration.alt: Granny with open arms showing love and warmth to Thandi

illustration.description: All family members surround little Thandi in a loving group hug, with colorful blankets draped around them like a rainbow. Everyone's faces show pure happiness and love. The composition creates a warm circle of family with Thandi at the center, using all the warm colors from previous pages.
illustration.alt: Whole family in a loving group hug with Thandi in the center

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: Who did Thandi play peek-a-boo with first?
questions.explanation: Thandi played peek-a-boo with Mama first!

questions.question: What color was Papa's blanket?
questions.explanation: Papa hid behind a blue and green striped blanket!

questions.question: Who is Dada?
questions.explanation: Dada is Thandi's big brother who played peek-a-boo too!
